nodes.label: AI as writing refinement tool
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like to have AI do writing for me. I want to be the one who is writing my captions

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming partner for captions
nodes.grounding_span: ask it to help me come up with ideas for captions

nodes.label: AI as logistical planner for scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: have it help me match each dog with what products will fit and then give me a schedule

nodes.label: AI output distinctiveness across clients
nodes.label_negative: AI output sounding same across clients
nodes.grounding_span: the ideas it gives me for one client sound almost identical to the ideas it gave me for another

nodes.label: Human creativity as differentiator from AI
nodes.grounding_span: human creativity is differentiated from AI

nodes.label: Professional integrity and job ownership
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't feel right to me to just hand that over to AI to do my job for me

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and unique voice
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want them all sounding the same

nodes.label: Efficiency and time optimization
nodes.grounding_span: free up my time to be able to do higher level tasks

nodes.label: Ethical resistance to AI writing replacement
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't feel right to me to just hand that over to AI to do my job for me

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for logistical planning
nodes.grounding_span: it actually benefits my company for me to input this into AI and free up my time

nodes.label: Frustration with AI generating similar ideas across clients
nodes.grounding_span: the ideas it gives me for one client sound almost identical to the ideas it gave me for another

nodes.label: Confidence in human creativity as safeguard
nodes.grounding_span: human creativity is what protects my skills and my work

nodes.label: Ethical boundary-setting based on job role
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like I was hired into this position to do a certain job

nodes.label: Iterative prompting to refine AI output
nodes.grounding_span: I'll just point out to the model that what it gave me sounds really similar
